Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 30, 2026

Timetable Creator is a Chrome extension that helps users create and manage a weekly timetable directly in their browser.

Data Collection

Timetable Creator does not collect, transmit, or share any personal data.

All information you enter—including class names, room numbers, timetable entries, colors, schedule times, and timetable titles—is stored locally using the chrome.storage.local API.

This data:

  • Remains entirely on your device.
  • Is never uploaded to any external server.
  • Is never accessed by the developer.
  • Is never shared with or sold to any third party.

Permissions Used

  • storage – Used only to save your timetable locally so it remains available between browser sessions.
  • tabs – Used only to open a print-friendly page in a new browser tab when you choose to print your timetable. The extension does not read, monitor, or collect information from your other browser tabs.

Third-Party Services

Timetable Creator does not use analytics, advertising, tracking services, or any third-party data collection.

Changes to This Policy

If this Privacy Policy is updated, the latest version will be published on this page.

Contact

For questions about this Privacy Policy, please use the support contact listed on the Chrome Web Store page for Timetable Creator.

© 2026 Timetable Creator
